purpose: Transform the-living-constitution from a governance-documentation repo into a first-class AI safety research artifact that demonstrates Corey Alejandro's original contributions to runtime constitutional governance for agentic AI systems. Every contract preserves the author's voice, POV, and lived-experience authority. No fabrication. No inflation. Make the real work undeniable.
execution_model: Sequential. Each contract is a standalone zero-shot prompt. Any model (Haiku, Gemini Flash, GPT-4o-mini, Sonnet, Opus) can execute any contract. Each contract reads specific files, produces specific outputs, and writes a completion marker. The next contract checks for the previous marker before starting.
voice_constraint: NON-NEGOTIABLE: The author's voice is direct, raw, neurodivergent-first, governance-obsessed, and unapologetically Black. Do not sanitize, academicize, or flatten it. The voice IS the differentiator. Write like the author writes — not like a research paper, not like corporate documentation.
dependency_graph: B-001 -> B-002, B-003, B-005 (parallel eligible) -> B-004 (after B-003) -> B-006 (after B-004 + B-005) -> B-007 (after all)
